title: Inheriting charity activities·Tianhui warms people's hearts, Tianhui Group's winter warmth activity enters Hongyang Senior Apartment
contentHtml:
December 21, 2019 (Saturday)This morning, the sunshine is as warm as the hearts of Tianhui’s first batch of caring volunteers...

Early in the morning, a group of Tianhui volunteers wearing red vests and red hats gathered at the door of Hongyang Senior Apartment, with bright smiles on their faces.
Respecting, respecting and loving the elderly are the traditional virtues of the Chinese nation. This winter warmth activity is the first stop of the "Inheritance Charity Action·Tianhui Warms the Heart" charity charity action. Since its establishment in 2004, Tianhui Group has become a leader in the plastic sales industry through continuous pioneering efforts.While developing their own business, Chairman Zeng Shengwen and President Du Shuang also do not forget to give back to the society. The group has been mainly subsidizing impoverished mountainous areas for many years.The two leaders said:“The forms of giving back to society can be diversified, and as long as the group’s ability allows, we hope to help more people!"December 22nd coincides with the winter solstice, and eating dumplings is a tradition for northerners on the winter solstice. Considering the hygiene aspect, the group specially purchased quick-frozen dumplings, which come in many varieties and flavors.Paired with high-quality Gannan navel oranges, branded milk and other consolation items, the purpose is to enable the elderly in nursing homes to live a warm winter solstice.
In this charity activity, our lovely Tianhui volunteers also prepared a small theatrical performance for the elderly. The caring volunteers each displayed their talents. Although our performances were not professional, our sincerity was unique.
Tianhui Group's "Inheritance Charity Action·Tianhui Warms People's Hearts" is just the beginning of Tianhui's charity charity action. We are willing to regard charity as a long-term career. We are willing to give back to more people, help more people, carry forward the Tianhui spirit of selfless dedication, use small power to drive the collective, use the collective to drive the society, and make the world full of love~
List of the first batch of Tianhui loving volunteers:
One place: Liu Li, Pan Wentao
Second place: Li Jing, Yang Zhunsheng, Chang Hongying
Three places: Zhou Wang, Hu Kun, Ma Baoxin, Cui Jianyu, Gao Songhe, Liu ChaoLogistics Department:Lu Baoliang, Zhang ShuguangFinance Department: Wang Baokun
Administration Department: Guo Changyou, Zhang Yu, Zhao Jing

Logistics Department: Wang Zhenguo
titleZh: 传承公益行·天晖暖人心，天晖集团冬日送温暖活动走进红阳老年公寓
contentHtmlZh:
2019年12月21日(周六)今日清晨，阳光如天晖首批爱心志愿者的心一样温暖……

一大早红阳老年公寓的门口就汇集一群穿着红色马甲，戴着红帽子，脸上洋溢着灿烂的笑容的天晖爱心志愿者。
尊老、敬老、爱老是中华民族的传统美德，此次冬日送温暖活动是《传承公益行·天晖暖人心》爱心公益行动的第一站。天晖集团自2004年成立以来，通过不断的开创努力，成为塑料销售行业的佼佼者。在发展自身业务的同时，董事长曾胜文、总裁杜霜也不忘回馈社会，集团多年来一直以资助贫困山区为主。二位领导表示：“回馈社会的形式可以多样化，只要集团能力允许，我们希望帮助更多人！”12月22日，恰逢冬至，吃饺子是北方人冬至日的传统，考虑到卫生方面，集团特采购速冻水饺，品种多、口味多。搭配上等的赣南脐橙，品牌牛奶等慰问品，目的是为了养老院的老人能过上一个温暖的冬至日。
此次爱心公益活动，我们可爱的天晖爱心志愿者还为老人准备了小型的文艺汇演。爱心志愿者各自发挥才艺，虽然我们的表演不是专业的，但是我们的真情是独一无二的。
天晖集团《传承公益行·天晖暖人心》，这仅仅是天晖爱心公益行动的开始，我们愿意把爱心事业当成长期的一份事业来做，我们愿意回馈更多人、帮助更多人，弘扬无私奉献的天晖精神，以小力量带动集体，以集体带动社会，让人间充满爱~
第一批天晖爱心志愿者名单：
一处：刘利、潘文韬
二处：李敬、杨准生、唱红颖
三处：周旺、胡焜、马宝新、崔建宇、高松贺、刘超物流部：卢宝亮、张曙光财务部：王宝坤
行政部：郭长有、张宇、赵静

后勤部：王振国
